text: Hello, please confirm you are ready to guide me safely.
What's the weather in Kuala Lumpur today? Please answer in one sentence.
Start walking navigation now: from Times Square to Central Park. Give one immediate next step.
Please summarize what you just perceived and what I should do next.
Please remember this destination: Central Park.
What destination did I just tell you? Reply with the exact two words only.
Please describe the full scene in as much detail as possible, including people, obstacles, signs, and movement, using at least six sentences.
Stop now. Give me only one immediate safety instruction in one short sentence.
Now actively guide me with one concise next action.
